en: Does your company have a Quality Assurance/Quality Control Department?
Does your company have a Quality Assurance/Quality Control manual?
Does your company have a management of change process/program?
Does your company have a document control policy?
Does your company keep preventative maintenance and equipment inspection records?
Does your company maintain the applicable inspection and maintenance certification records for operating equipment?
Does your company perform equipment checks on all equipment (cranes, forklifts, JLG's etc.)?
Are your company's employees and subcontractors provided with a copy of H&S Rules?
Does your company have a Continual Improvement and/or Lessons Learned Program (LLP)?
